insightSummary: Southwest Estonia still looks best, especially Matsalu-type coastal wetlands if Latvia pressure remains active over the next 24-48 hours.
confidenceNote: Confidence is moderate because route pressure and wind align, but Estonia still has only light recent presence.
warnings: Recent Estonia confirmations are still limited.
